meta_title: For Students: Antigravity project template to Solve can't validate ideas (Beginner Checklist)
meta_description: Learn how to Antigravity project template and overcome can't validate ideas. A Beginner-level Checklist using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: Antigravity Project Template: Validate AI Ideas Fast
content.seo_description: Stop guessing. Use the Antigravity project template and Claude Code to validate your AI ideas in hours. A beginner-friendly checklist for aspiring builders.
content.answer_block: The 'can't validate ideas' paralysis stems from over-engineering before testing market resonance. By utilizing the Antigravity project template, you isolate core value propositions into rapid, deployable prototypes. Combine this with Claude Code to automate boilerplate, allowing you to iterate on feedback loops rather than spending weeks on unproven technical infrastructure.
content.intro:
You stare at a blank screen, the weight of a dozen 'million-dollar' ideas pressing down on you. The fear isn't that you can't code; it's that you’ll spend three months building something nobody wants. This is the 'Founder's Purgatory,' where dreams go to die in local host environments that never see the light of day.

But the era of the solo-developer bottleneck is over. By treating your code as an ephemeral experiment rather than a permanent monument, you strip away the friction of validation. We are going to use the Antigravity framework to transform your abstract concepts into functional, high-fidelity prototypes, effectively killing the doubt before it kills your project.

steps.title: Define the Value Core
steps.description: Strip your idea down to a single feature that solves one specific pain point. If you can't explain it in one sentence, you can't build it in one week.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze the core value proposition: [Insert Idea]. Generate a MVP scope that focuses only on the primary user outcome, ignoring all secondary features.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'Create a project specification document based on the core value proposition of [Idea].'

steps.title: Initialize the Antigravity Scaffold
steps.description: Generate the boilerplate using the Antigravity template to ensure your architecture is production-ready from line one.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a project scaffold using the Antigravity template for a [Stack: e.g., Next.js/Python] application. Include authentication and basic database schema.

steps.title: Rapid Logic Implementation
steps.description: Use Claude Code to map your business logic into the scaffold. Keep the code modular so you can swap features based on user feedback.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Implement the core logic for [Feature Name] within the existing Antigravity structure. Ensure clear separation of concerns.
steps.claude_code_command: claude add 'Implement the logic for [Feature] following the MVC pattern in the Antigravity template.'

steps.title: Deploy to Edge
steps.description: Don't wait for perfection. Deploy your prototype to a live URL immediately to start collecting real user data.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Configure the deployment settings for the current project. Provide instructions for a one-click deployment to Vercel.

steps.title: Validate via Feedback Loop
steps.description: Send your link to five potential users. Use the feedback to decide whether to pivot or persevere.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a feedback collection form schema and an automated email template to send to beta users for validation.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'Generate a user feedback survey based on the primary features of this MVP.'

pro_tips: Never build a database schema until you have manually simulated the user flow with a spreadsheet.
Treat every line of code as a liability; if it doesn't contribute to the core validation, delete it.
Use Claude Code to write your integration tests before you write the UI; it forces you to think about the API contract.
If your prototype takes more than 48 hours to build, you are building too much. Cut the scope by 50%.
Automate your feedback collection—if you have to manually ask for feedback, you aren't building a system, you're doing chores.
content.next_steps: Once your prototype is live, monitor the user sessions using a tool like PostHog or LogRocket. If users aren't engaging with the core value prop, revisit Step 1, pivot your concept, and redeploy within 24 hours.
content.conversion_block: You have the tools, the framework, and the methodology to stop guessing and start shipping. Every day you wait is a day your competition captures the market. Stop the analysis paralysis and build your proof-of-concept today. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
